query: INSERT INTO team_tools (team, label, href, emoji, color, sortOrder) VALUES ('天理', '同行者一覧', 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1lb4GywyJEiXwk6MwdtkcGp9zhYu17FeO0Rh_czmMwXU/edit?gid=1729320957#gid=1729320957', '📋', 'text-emerald-600', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sortOrder), 0) + 1 FROM team_tools WHERE team = '天理'));
